notes: Cloudsis Monzo May 2026 statement. Format: summary_and_transactions, transaction_order: newest_first. Gemini returns opening_balance=null in the summary block — opening must be derived by walking the balance chain back from the oldest transaction (82524.92 + 32.64 outflow = 82557.56). This regression test guards against any future change to the solver that breaks the 'opening is null, derive from chain' code path.
